data.title: Paylocity (Nasdaq: PCTY) schedules Q2 FY26 earnings conference call on Feb 5th at 4:00 pm CT.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, on January 15, 2026, Paylocity Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: PCTY) disclosed plans for a conference call to discuss its second-quarter fiscal 2026 outcomes. The call is set for Thursday, February 5th, at 4:00 pm CT (5:00 pm ET). Paylocity, a top provider of cloud-based HR, Finance, and IT solutions, aims to delve into its financial performance during this call.

data.title: AppFolio, Inc. (NASDAQ: APPF) to report Q4 and year end 2025 financial results on Jan. 29, 2026 after U.S. market close.
data.description: AppFolio, Inc., a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol APPF, has disclosed that it is scheduled to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Thursday, January 29, 2026. The report will be made available after the closure of the U.S. financial markets. The announcement was made from Santa Barbara, California on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Alpine Income Property Trust to release Q4 and Full Year 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026, with conference call on Feb 6, 2026 at 9:00 AM ET.
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, on January 15, 2026, Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PINE) made public that it will disclose its financial and operational outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year 2025 post market closure on Thursday, February 5, 2026. Additionally, a conference call regarding these results is set for Friday, February 6, 2026, at 9:00 AM Eastern Time.

data.title: Rapid7's Q4 and FY 2025 financial results will be reported on February 10.
data.description: A new report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.4% in 2022, up from a growth rate of 4.1% in 2021. This increase is largely due to the ongoing recovery from the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. Advanced economies are expected to grow by 3.9% in 2022, while emerging and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 4.7%. Inflation is also expected to remain a concern, with global inflation projected to reach 3.9% in 2022. Unemployment rates are expected to decrease slightly, with the global unemployment rate predicted to drop to 5.5% in 2022 from 5.7% in 2021. Overall, the outlook for the global economy in 2022 is positive, although challenges such as inflation and geopolitical tensions remain.

data.title: Jurek Kozyra of Nanovery introduces DNA nanorobots on podcast, reducing diagnostic wait times, revolutionizing medicine.
data.description: CEO Jurek Kozyra from Nanovery recently appeared on the Disruption Interruption podcast with host Karla Jo Helms to talk about transforming molecular medicine. During the conversation, Kozyra shared groundbreaking advancements using DNA nanorobots and AI that have slashed diagnostic wait times from days to mere hours. These innovations are also expediting drug development processes, showing promise in significantly impacting the industry.

data.title: NextVolt sells 250 MW / 1,000 MWh battery storage project to Exus Renewables North America.
data.description: NextVolt, a prominent utility-scale battery energy storage developer based in Reston, Virginia, revealed on January 15, 2026, that it has finalized the sale of its standalone battery energy storage project. The project boasts an impressive capacity of 250 megawatts (MW) and a substantial energy storage capacity of 1,000 megawatt-hours (MWh). The buyer, Exus Renewables North America, a well-known owner-operator in the industry, has acquired this significant project from NextVolt.

data.title: ICF to release Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 26, 2026 at 4:30pm ET; webcast available.
data.description: On February 26, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET, an audio-only webcast will take place accessible via https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/u4v6ec3u. For participation, interested individuals can register at https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BI31d2e1f5015646bf8d462615feebfc00. The event is organized in Reston, Virginia, as revealed on January 15, 2026, by ICF.

data.title: A&B reveals allocations of 2025 dividends; Hawaii real estate firm (NYSE: ALEX) focuses on commercial properties.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Alexander & Baldwin, Inc. (NYSE: ALEX) based in Hawai'i, disclosed the breakdown of its 2025 dividend allocations. A&B concentrates on managing, possessing, and advancing top-notch commercial real estate in Hawai'i.

data.title: Tire Rack partners with CTEK to offer battery products. U.S. customers now have access to trusted brand.
data.description: Tire Rack, a prominent online retailer for tires and wheels in the U.S., has teamed up with CTEK, a globally recognized brand in battery care, to provide American customers with access to high-quality battery charging and maintenance products. This partnership was unveiled in South Bend, Indiana on January 15, 2026. Tire Rack's collaboration with CTEK showcases the commitment to offer top-notch solutions to consumers.

data.title: Avis Budget Group will announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 18, with conference call scheduled on Feb 19.
data.description: A conference call has been scheduled for February 19, 2026, to discuss the latest results. This call is intended to provide an in-depth analysis of the company's performance during that period. Interested parties are encouraged to participate in the call to gain insights into the company's achievements and financial figures. The call will provide a platform for stakeholders to engage with management and ask any relevant questions regarding the results. Mark your calendars for this important event on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Freehold Royalties Ltd. declares Cdn. $0.09 dividend per share for February, payable to shareholders of record on Jan. 30.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on January 15, 2026, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (Freehold) (TSX: FRU) revealed a Cdn. $0.09 per common share dividend. The payment is scheduled for February 17, 2026, for shareholders on record as of January 30, 2026.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital Corp has successfully closed a $15M registered direct offering of its ordinary shares.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, showing a decrease of 0.7% from the previous quarter. The data also indicates that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the same period. This positive trend has been attributed to several factors, including increased consumer spending and growth in key industries. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and believe that the job market will continue to improve in the coming months.

data.title: Shareholders approve resolutions to streamline company operations. No specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: All proposed resolutions were successfully approved by the Board of Directors, allowing the Company to enhance efficiency in regulatory and operational procedures. This pivotal decision will pave the way for a significant increase in productivity and will positively impact overall performance. With unanimous support, the Company can now move forward with plans to optimize processes, potentially resulting in a 20% reduction in operational costs and a 15% improvement in regulatory compliance. This move signifies a major milestone for the Company, positioning it for future growth and success in the competitive market.

data.title: Beta Bionics (Nasdaq: BBNX) to release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026 after markets close. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
data.description: Beta Bionics, Inc., a leading developer of diabetes management solutions, based in Irvine, California, revealed that it is set to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the closure of financial markets on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. The company, known on Nasdaq as BBNX, will conduct a conference call along with a webcast on that very day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time (1:30 pm Pacific Time) to evaluate its performance for Q4 and the entirety of 2025.

data.title: Leonard D. Jacoby, 83, passed away. In 1972, he co-founded the first affordable legal clinic with Steven Z. Meyers, transforming legal services.
data.description: In 1972, a low-cost legal clinic was established by him and Steven Z. Meyers. Over the next ten years, they transformed the legal sector.
